testcase.name: traSach_taoThongBao_khongGuiEmail
testcase.system-out: >>> [TRẢ] đã tạo thông báo, không gửi email (đúng yêu cầu)
testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\dhnga\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.8\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: muonSach_taoThongBao_vaGuiEmail
testcase.system-out: >>> [MƯỢN] đã tạo thông báo + gửi email cho t_user@example.com
